title: Drag and drop Dashboard name´s list
excerpt:
Hello good morning. 
The dashboard name´s are not sort, they appear in the order that each one was created. 
There is no way to drag and drop every one to order them, or put them in folders. 
Please we need to solve this…

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello good morning.
The dashboard name´s are not sort, they appear in the order that each one was created.
There is no way to drag and drop every one to order them, or put them in folders.
Please we need to solve this… we have many dashboards active and is chaotic to show them…

As an extra feature request, i will add the feature of duplicate dashboards.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 for me

Or treat the dashboard as any other board and make it a board type ‘dashboard’, in that way it can be organized in folders together with other boards needed for a specific solution.

posts.author: Ben-monday.com (Ben Feldman ( monday.com))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Everyone,

Ben here from monday.com! This is an awesome suggestion! I have gone ahead and passed this on to our product team so that they could take a look.

I especially like the idea of being able to add a dashboard to the same folder as other boards.

Please keep the suggestions coming, they really help us build our roadmap, and understand exactly what our users are looking for!

Currently, you can add dashboards to your favourites, and add it to a folder there.

image460×736 20.9 KB

Best,
Ben

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ben-monday.com, there is any news on this?
We need to re-order our dashboard lists, or put them in folders, same as boards.

posts.author: Ben-monday.com (Ben Feldman ( monday.com))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Happy to let you know, that in the favourites section, you can now add a dashboard to a folder! Would this work for you?

Best,
Ben

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the reply, yes this will work.
Besides this my question goes to the Dashboard section, is on the roadmap to make this improvements?

posts.author: Steffen (Steffen Hoh)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? Is it so complicated to sort dashboards?

posts.author: SteveC (Steve Chu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ben,

This does not work for me unless I as an Admin am able to apply this to all users. I need the ability to sort Dashboards for all users and organize them into folders.

Thanks!

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see that feature as Dashboard can get disorganized quickly.

posts.author: Steffen (Steffen Hoh)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here, can’t be that complicated to sort them like the boards??

posts.author: OmerZ (Omer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hlopezvc, @basdebruin, @Steffen,

When I logged in today I noticed this new feature. This is fantastic and might be of great help for you.

image1674×1332 257 KB
